mapper.select: SELECT IF(COUNT(LOGIN_ID) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USER_CREDENTIAL WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
SELECT IF(COUNT(NICKNAME) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USERS WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}
SELECT IF(COUNT(EMAIL) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( NICKNAME, NAME, EMAIL, PROFILE_IMG_URL, ADDR1, ADDR2, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{name}, #{email}, #{profileImgUrl}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, NULL, NOW(), 'system', NOW(), 'system')
INSERT INTO USER_CREDENTIAL ( USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY) VALUES (#{userId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId})
INSERT INTO USER_ROLES ( USER_ID, ROLE, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY) VALUES (#{userId}, #{role}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId})

INSERT INTO USER_TARGET_JOB ( USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId})

INSERT INTO USER_EMPLOYMENT ( USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, COMPANY_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{companyName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId})
